Highlights

  • Journey back to the origins of chocolate and learn how cocoa conquered Europe
  • Follow the chocolate manufacturing process in a modern test facility
  • Marvel at the 9-meter high chocolate fountain in the entrance hall
  • Savor unlimited tastings of irresistible Swiss chocolate

Full description

Visit the interactive Lindt Home of Chocolate Museum, built next to the historical Lindt & Sprüngli factory. Discover the long journey that cocoa takes from bean to bar on an audio-guided tour.

See an impressive chocolate fountain in the entrance hall, over 9 meters tall. Learn how chocolate conquered the world and explore every step of the production process through multimedia exhibitions.

Visit the tasting room, where you can savor a variety of chocolate delicacies. See the production line through panoramic windows and watch as new products are created.

Includes

Museum entrance ticket
Audio guide
Chocolate tasting

Know before you go

  • Children below 7 years old must be accompanied by an adult at all times.

5
5 out of 5 stars
C
Callum – ⁦🇬🇧 United Kingdom⁩June 15, 2026 - Verified booking
+0
+0
+0
I want to start this review with a bewildering statement I heard from someone on our tour “It’s not good, there is just to much chocolate” It’s a chocolate factory……. I Think that woman’s version of a horror film might be Willy wonka, anyway review time! Fantastic experience and well worth the cost of admission would suggest for anyone to visit here if they’re visiting Zurich. You must book in advance though as booking on the day is almost impossible and you may be waiting up to 3 hours. My only improvement please have more white chocolate fountains cause by god it was beautiful!
Was this helpful?
